nasb.text: The doorway for the lowest side chamber was on the right side of the house; and they would go up by winding stairs to the middle story, and from the middle to the third.

esv.text: The entrance for the lowest story was on the south side of the house, and one went up by stairs to the middle story, and from the middle story to the third.

cnv.text: 廂房的下層門在殿的右邊，人可以從螺旋形梯子上廂房的中層，再從中層上到第三層。

ccb.text: 底层厢房的进口在殿的南面，沿着一道螺旋楼梯可以通到第二层和第三层。
